mapper.sql: id, task_id, bucket_name, scan_prefix, status, total_files, scanned_files, sensitive_files_found, total_scan_size, sensitive_data_types, start_time, end_time, duration_seconds, error_message, created_time, updated_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sensitive_data_scan_record WHERE bucket_name = #{bucketName} ORDER BY start_time DESC
SELECT FROM sensitive_data_scan_record WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY start_time DESC
SELECT FROM sensitive_data_scan_record WHERE sensitive_files_found >= #{minCount} ORDER BY start_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE sensitive_data_scan_record SET status = #{status}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
UPDATE sensitive_data_scan_record SET scanned_files = #{scannedFiles}, sensitive_files_found = #{sensitiveFilesFound}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sensitive_data_scan_record WHERE created_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{expireDays} DAY)
